html:
Exclusive to:

Mysterious Plant is a Plant that can be found in the Cave, commonly in the Wilds biome.

Mysterious Plant emits light constantly on a small radius. They can be harvested for 1 Lesser Glow Berry and regrows in 4 Days.

Idle Depths Worm transform themself to look alike Mysterious Plant and lure players. They wake up and attack any player who tries to harvest them or stays nearby for too long.

Tips

  • Depths Worm's Mysterous Plant will always be wet, thus, it is possible to distinguish between the two.
    • In the case of rain, the Mysterious Plant is capable of being set on fire, the Depths Worm's however is not.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Seems safe to me.”
–Wilson
“Light without fire. Unnatural.”
–Willow
“Pretty light.”
–Wolfgang
“It seems out of place.”
–Wendy
“THAT PLANT SEEMS SUSPICIOUS”
–WX-78
“Reminds me of the Anglerfish.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just a regular old plant.”
–Woodie
“You aren't fooling me, plant.”
–Maxwell
“I smell a trap.”
–Wigfrid
“What could possibly go wrong?”
–Webber
“I see nothing amiss here.”
–Warly
“Hmm... not safe”
–Wormwood
“Nothing out of the ordinary.”
–Winona
“The shimmer of a soul lurks below.”
–Wortox
“Pretty......”
–Wurt
“What's wrong Woby? It's just a plant!”
–Walter
“Something's nagging at my memory... ah, it's probably nothing.”
–Wanda
Mysterious Plant is a Plant that can be found in the Cave, commonly in the Wilds biome.
Mysterious Plant emits light constantly on a small radius. They can be harvested for 1 Lesser Glow Berry and regrows in 4 Days.
Idle Depths Worm transform themself to look alike Mysterious Plant and lure players. They wake up and attack any player who tries to harvest them or stays nearby for too long.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Depths Worm's Mysterous Plant will always be wet, thus, it is possible to distinguish between the two.
In the case of rain, the Mysterious Plant is capable of being set on fire, the Depths Worm's however is not.

'''Mysterious Plant''' is a [[Plant]] that can be found in the [[Cave]], commonly in the [[Wilds]] biome.

Mysterious Plant emits light constantly on a small radius. They can be harvested for 1 [[Lesser Glow Berry]] and regrows in 4 [[Day]]s.

Idle [[Depths Worm]] transform themself to look alike Mysterious Plant and lure players. They wake up and attack any player  who tries to harvest them or stays nearby for too long.

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Depths Worm's Mysterous Plant will always be wet, thus, it is possible to distinguish between the two.
** In the case of rain, the Mysterious Plant is capable of being set on fire, the Depths Worm's however is not.
{{clear}}
{{Structures}}
